sentences: The driver used a jack to change the flat tire. 司機用千斤頂換了漏氣的輪胎。
Please plug your headphones into the audio jack. 請將耳機插入音訊插孔。

meaning: 執行 瑣碎 或 日常 任務的人； <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/dog="s)。
sentences: The term jackal refers to A person who performs menial or routine tasks; a dogsbody. 豺狼這個字指的是執行 卑微 或 日常 任務的人； 豺狼一詞指的是執行卑微或日常任務的人；狗的身體。 豺狼這個字指的是執行卑微或日常任務的人；
The lesson introduced jackal as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了豺狼這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了豺狼這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了豺狼這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Don't be such a jackass; listen to what I'm saying! 別當那種傻瓜；聽聽我說的話！
The jackass let out a loud bray. 公驢發出了一聲響亮的嘶鳴。
It's a bit chilly outside; you should wear a jacket. 外面有點冷，你應該穿件夾克。
He hung his leather jacket on the rack by the door. 他把他的皮夾克掛在門邊的架子上。

meaning: jacks 遊戲中的六角棋子； jackstone 。
sentences: The term jackman refers to A six-pointed playing piece in the game of jacks; a jackstone. jackman 一詞指的是 jacks 遊戲中的六角棋子； jackstone 。 傑克曼一詞指的是傑克遊戲中的六角棋子；一塊千斤頂。 jackman 指的是jacks 遊戲中的六角棋子；jackstone 。
The lesson introduced jackman as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了傑克曼這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了傑克曼這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了傑克曼這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
She inherited a beautiful ancient jade necklace from her grandmother. 她從祖母那裡繼承了一條精美的古代玉項鍊。
The ornaments were made of high-quality jade and looked very elegant. 這些裝飾品是用優質玉石製成的，看起來非常優雅。

meaning: 用於捲曲餡餅、蛋糕等的鋸齒鐵。
sentences: The term jagger refers to a jagging iron used for crimping pies, cakes, etc. 術語「鋸齒機」是指用於壓接餡餅、蛋糕等的鋸齒鐵。
The lesson introduced jagger as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 jagger 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: Panthera onca 是一種原產於南美洲和中美洲的肉食性斑點大型貓科動物。
sentences: The term jaguar refers to a carnivorous spotted large cat native to South and Central America, Panthera onca. 美洲虎一詞指的是原產於南美洲和中美洲的肉食性斑點大型貓科動物 Panthera onca。
The lesson introduced jaguar as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「美洲虎」這個易於理解的有用術語。
The criminal was sentenced to five years in jail for his serious crimes. 該罪犯因其嚴重罪行被判處五年徒刑（坐牢）。
She works as a legal consultant, helping prisoners in the local jail. 她擔任法律顧問，幫助當地監獄的囚犯。

meaning: 一名警察、一名執法人員（有時尤其是步行而不是乘坐巡邏車）。
sentences: The term jake refers to a police officer, a law enforcement officer (sometimes especially one on foot rather than in a patrol car). 「傑克」一詞指的是一名警察、一名執法人員（有時特指步行的而不是乘坐巡邏車的）。
The lesson introduced jake as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 jake 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I like to put some strawberry jam on my morning toast. 我喜歡在吐司上抹一些草莓果醬。
We were late for the meeting because of a massive traffic jam. 因為嚴重的交通堵塞，我們開會遲到了。
You can use "jam jar" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「jam jar」。
"jam jar" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「jam jar」非常好用。
The school janitor is responsible for maintaining the buildings and grounds. 學校管理員（工友）負責維護建築和場地。
He works as a janitor at a large apartment complex in the city center. 他在市中心的一座大型公寓大樓擔任管理員。
She is studying Japanese at university. 她正在大學學習日語。
I love Japanese cuisine, especially sushi and ramen. 我喜歡日本料理，尤其是壽司和拉麵。
She kept the delicious homemade cookies in a large glass jar. 她把美味的手作餅乾放在一個大玻璃罐裡。
Could you please help me open the tight lid of this pickle jar? 你能幫我開啟這個泡菜罐那緊閉的蓋子嗎？

meaning: 难以理解或无法理解的言语或语言；胡言乱语。
sentences: The term jargon refers to speech or language that is incomprehensible or unintelligible; gibberish. 行話一詞是指難以理解或難以理解的言語或語言；胡言亂語。
The lesson introduced jargon as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了行話作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The sweet scent of fresh jasmine filled the air in the small garden. 新鮮茉莉花的甜美香味瀰漫在小花園的空氣中。
They enjoyed a cup of fragrant jasmine tea while sitting on the porch. 他們坐在門廊上喝了一杯芬芳的茉莉花茶。

meaning: 除紅玉髓外任何顏色鮮豔的玉髓。
sentences: The term jasper refers to any bright-coloured kind of chalcedony apart from cornelian. 碧玉一詞是指紅玉髓以外的任何顏色鮮豔的玉髓。
The lesson introduced jasper as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了碧玉這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He suffered a broken jaw during the intense championship boxing match. 他在激烈的冠軍拳擊賽中弄斷了下顎。
The huge shark opened its jaws wide, showing its sharp white teeth. 巨鯊張開大口，露出鋒利的白牙。
The archaeologists found an ancient jawbone at the site. 考古學家在該遺址發現了一塊古代下顎骨。
The human jawbone is also known as the mandible. 人體下顎骨也被稱為 mandible。
The model has a very sharp and prominent jawline. 這位模特兒有著非常清晰且突出的下顎線。
He has a strong jawline that gives him a masculine appearance. 他有著堅毅的下顎線，這讓他看起來很有男子氣概。
He loves listening to classic jazz music while he's relaxing at home. 他休息時喜歡在家聽經典爵士樂。
The city hosts an international jazz festival every summer. 這座城市每年夏天都會舉辦國際爵士音樂節。
She felt a bit jealous of her sister's academic success and achievements. 她對妹妹的學業成就感到有些嫉妒。
Don't be jealous; everyone has their own unique talents and gifts. 別嫉妒；每個人都有自己獨特的才華與天賦。
She struggled to control her jealousy of her sister's great success. 她努力控制自己對妹妹巨大成功的嫉妒（心）。
Jealousy can often lead to unnecessary conflicts in relationships. 嫉妒往往會導致關係中不必要的衝突。
I like to wear comfortable jeans and a T-shirt on weekends. 我週末喜歡穿舒服的牛仔褲和 T 恤。
She bought a new pair of blue jeans at the mall. 她在購物中心買了一條新的藍色牛仔褲。
We took a rugged jeep tour through the remote mountain villages. 我們搭乘吉普車穿過了偏遠的山村進行了一次粗獷的旅行。
The military uses specialized jeeps for transporting goods and personnel. 軍方使用專門的吉普車來運送物資與人員。
The crowd began to jeer when the politician appeared. 當那位政治家出現時，人群開始嘲笑。
Don't jeer at others just because they are different. 不要只因為別人不同就嘲笑他們。
I like to put some strawberry jelly and peanut butter on my toast. 我喜歡在吐司上抹一些草莓果凍（果醬）和花生醬。
The dessert was a colorful fruit jelly served with fresh whipped cream. 這道甜點是搭配新鮮鮮奶油的繽紛果凍。
Be careful not to get stung by a jellyfish while swimming. 游泳時小心不要被水母螫傷。
There were several beautiful translucent jellyfish in the aquarium. 水族館裡有幾隻漂亮的半透明水母。

meaning: 將纖維紡成多錠線的裝置（也稱為珍妮紡紗）。
sentences: The term jenny refers to a device for spinning thread from fiber onto multiple spindles (also called spinning jenny). 術語珍妮是指將纖維紡成線到多個錠子上的設備（也稱為珍妮紡紗）。
The lesson introduced jenny as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了珍妮這個易於理解的有用術語。
After having an affair with a junior, her chances of promotion were seriously jeopardized. 與一名後輩發生婚外情後，她的晉昇機會受到嚴重 威脅 。 與一名後輩發生婚外情後，她的升職機會受到嚴重威脅。 與一位後輩發生婚外情後，她的機會受到了嚴重威脅。
People often jeopardize when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會陷入危險。 當情況需要時，人們常常會陷入危險。 當情況需要時，人們常常會陷入危險。

meaning: 失敗、傷害或損失的危險。
sentences: The poor condition of the vehicle put its occupants in constant jeopardy. 車輛狀況不佳使車內人員始終處於危險之中。
The term jeopardy refers to danger of failure, harm, or loss. 危險一詞是指失敗、傷害或損失的危險。

meaning: 其特徵是身體抽搐，或突然且不均勻的進展。
sentences: jerky flight 生澀的飛行
jerky movement 生澀的運動

meaning: Jerry（“一個德國人”）的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term jerry refers to alternative letter-case form of Jerry (“a German”). 術語 jerry 指的是 Jerry（「德國人」）的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced jerry as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 jerry 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The players were wearing their team's blue and white jerseys. 球員們穿著球隊的藍白相間運動衫。
She bought a soft jersey dress for the summer. 她買了一件柔軟的平針織連衣裙準備過夏天。
I said it in jest, I didn't mean to offend you. 我是在開玩笑，無意冒犯。
Life is not a jest; you should take it seriously. 生活不是玩笑；你應該嚴肅對待。
The pilot managed to navigate the private jet through the heavy storm. 飛行員設法駕駛私人噴氣機穿過了強大暴風雨。
She experienced a bit of jet lag after her long flight from New York. 在從紐約飛來的長途飛行後，她感到有些時差（噴氣機滯後）。
The loud noise of the jet engine could be heard throughout the area. 整個地區都能聽到噴氣發動機的巨大轟鳴聲。
Engineers are working to develop more efficient jet engines. 工程師正致力於開發更高效的噴氣發動機。

meaning: 建築物的一部分，噴射或突出於其他部分之外；具體來說，是懸垂在下方建築物部分之上的上層樓層。
sentences: The term jetty refers to a part of a building that jets or projects beyond the rest; specifically, an upper storey which overhangs the part of the building below. 碼頭一詞是指建築物中噴射或突出於其他部分之外的部分；具體來說，是懸垂在下方建築物部分之上的上層樓層。
The lesson introduced jetty as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 jetty 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The museum has a magnificent collection of ancient royal jewels. 博物館收藏了大量的古代皇室珠寶。
She wore a beautiful necklace with a large sparkling blue jewel. 她戴了一條鑲有一顆閃亮大藍寶石的漂亮項鍊。
The nurse jeweleded the report carefully yesterday. 護理師昨天仔細地jeweled了報告。
Our team jeweleds this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會jeweled這個步驟。
He bought his wife a stunning piece of jewelry for their anniversary. 他為太太買了一件絕美的珠寶慶祝週年。
You can find a wide variety of gold and silver jewelry in this store. 在這家店妳可以找到各式各樣的金銀首飾。
The term jihad refers to a holy war undertaken by Muslims. 聖戰一詞指的是穆斯林發動的聖戰。
The lesson introduced jihad as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「聖戰」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用作冰淇淋、餅乾或紙杯蛋糕的配料的糖粉。
sentences: chocolate jimmies; rainbow jimmies 巧克力吉米；彩虹吉米
The term jimmy refers to Sprinkles used as a topping for ice cream, cookies, or cupcakes. 吉米一詞指的是用作冰淇淋、餅乾或紙杯蛋糕配料的灑粉。
We could hear the gentle jingle of the bells as the reindeer approached. 隨著馴鹿靠近，我們可以聽到鈴鐺清脆的叮噹聲。
The company created a catchy jingle for its new advertising campaign. 該公司為其新廣告活動創作了一首朗朗上口的廣告歌。

meaning: 應該帶來厄運的人或事。
sentences: The term jinx refers to a person or thing supposed to bring bad luck. 惡咒一詞指的是被認為會帶來壞運氣的人或事物。
The lesson introduced jinx as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 jinx，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Don’t try to jive me! I know where you were last night! 別想逗我！我知道你昨晚在哪裡！
To jive means to deceive; to be deceptive. jive 意指欺騙；具有欺騙性。
He is looking for a new job in the software industry. 他正在尋找軟體產業的新工作。
Being a teacher is a very rewarding and challenging job. 當老師是一份非常有意義且具挑戰性的工作。
The economic crisis left thousands of people jobless. 經濟危機讓數千人失業。
The government provides support services for the jobless. 政府為失業者提供支援服務。
compiler jock 編譯器運動員
systems jock 系統運動員
The professional jockey rode the horse to victory in the final race. 專業賽馬騎師策馬贏得了最後一場比賽的勝利。
He has been working as a disc jockey for a popular radio station. 他一直擔任一家熱門廣播電台的唱片騎師（DJ）。

meaning: 四便士的硬幣，或其價值；價值四便士。
sentences: a joey of brandy 一杯白蘭地喬伊
The term joey refers to a fourpenny piece, or its value; fourpence worth. 喬伊這個字指的是四便士的硬幣，或其價值；價值四便士。
He goes for a quick jog in the park every morning to stay fit. 他每天早上在公園快跑以保持體態。
I need to go for a jog to clear my mind after a long day. 我需要在漫長的一天後去慢跑以清醒頭腦。
Would you like to join us for dinner tonight? 你想加入我們一起吃晚餐嗎？
She decided to join the local choir to improve her singing. 她決定加入當地的合唱團以提升她的歌藝。

meaning: 木製家具或配件製造商。
sentences: The term joiner refers to A maker of wooden furniture or fittings. 木工一詞是指木製家具或配件的製造商。
We learned the meaning of joiner during today's lesson. 今天的課程我們學習了joiner的意思。
The project was a joint effort between the two departments. 該專案是兩個部門共同努力的成果。
He has been experiencing a lot of pain in his knee joints. 他的膝關節一直感到很疼痛。

meaning: 在一起，作為一個整體；集體地。
sentences: They jointly raised the child, even though they were no longer married. 儘管他們不再結婚，但他們共同撫養孩子。
If someone acts jointly, they do so in a way that is together, acting as one; collectively. 如果有人共同行動，他們會以一種共同的方式行事，就像一個人一樣行動；集體。
He told a very funny joke that made everyone in the room laugh. 他講了一個非常有趣的笑話，逗得房間裡的每個人都哈哈大笑。
I'm just playing a joke on you; don't take it seriously. 我只是在跟你開玩笑，別當真。

meaning: 一個身份不明、聲譽不佳的人。
sentences: Some joker keeps throwing eggs at my windows. 有些小丑不斷向我的窗戶丟雞蛋。
Don't waste your breath on these jokers round here. 別在這附近的這些小丑身上浪費口舌了。
He is a jolly man who always has a smile on his face and a joke to tell. 他是一個快活的人，臉上總是帶著微笑，隨口就能講個笑話。
The children were in a jolly mood as they prepared for the party. 孩子們在準備派對時心情非常興奮（快活）。

meaning: 搖動；伴隨著一連串的猛烈動作。
sentences: The car jolted along the stony path. 車子沿著石子路顛簸行駛。
To jolt means to shake; to move with a series of jerks. 顛簸的意思是搖晃；伴隨著一系列的抽搐而移動。
Please jot down your address and phone number on this paper. 請在紙上草草記下你的地址和電話。
I don't have a jot of evidence to support my theory. 我一點證據也沒有來支持我的理論。
She is a regular contributor to an international medical journal. 她是一家國際醫學期刊的定期撰稿人。
I keep a daily journal to record my thoughts and experiences. 我寫日誌來記錄我的想法與經歷。
She decided to major in journalism because she wants to become a reporter. 她決定主修新聞學，因為她想成為一名記者。
Investigative journalism plays a crucial role in a democratic society. 調查性新聞工作在民主社會中發揮著至關重要的作用。
The journalist traveled to several war zones to report on the situation. 這位記者前往多個戰爭地區報導局勢。
A good journalist must be dedicated to finding the truth and reporting it. 一位優秀的記者必須致力於尋找真相並進行報導。
Substituting "[expletive]" for swear words in an article's text is a journalistic practice of sensibility. 在文章中用「[髒話]」代替髒話是一種新聞報導的敏感性做法。
Something described as journalistic is related to journalism or journalists. 所謂新聞性的事物與新聞或記者有關。
It was a long and tiring journey across the entire Asian continent. 那是一段橫跨整個亞洲大陸、漫長且令人疲憊的旅程。
Success is not just a destination, but a lifelong learning journey. 成功不僅是一個目的地，而是一段終身的學習旅程。

meaning: 在職業生涯中效力於許多不同球隊的球員。
sentences: The Los Angeles Lakers added journeyman forward Bob McAdoo to their roster in hopes that he could help them win a title. 洛杉磯湖人隊將熟練前鋒鮑勃麥卡杜加入他們的名單，希望他能幫助他們贏得總冠軍。
The term journeyman refers to A player who plays on many different teams during the course of his career. 「熟練工」一詞是指在職業生涯中效力於許多不同球隊的球員。
We practiced using jow in two different sentences. 我們練習把 jow 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The article mentioned jow in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 jow。
The old man had saggy jowls and a long white beard. 那個老人有著下垂的雙頰和長長的白鬍鬚。
The dog's jowls were dripping with saliva. 這隻狗的臉頰下部正流著口水。
The birth of their first child brought them immense joy. 第一個孩子的出生給他們帶來了巨大的喜悅。
She finds great joy in gardening and spending time outdoors. 她在園藝和戶外活動中找到了極大的樂趣。
The birth of their first child was a truly joyful and moving occasion. 第一個孩子的出生是一個真正令人喜悅且感人的時刻。
She gave a joyful smile when she heard the good news about her job. 聽到關於她工作的好消息時，她露出了開心的笑容。
He led a joyless life after the tragedy. 事故發生後，他過著不快樂的生活。
The room was decorated in a joyless style with dark colors. 房間以沈悶的深色調佈置。
The news of the baby's arrival was a joyous occasion for the whole family. 寶寶到來的消息對全家人來說都是一件喜悅的事。
They celebrated their graduation with a joyous party at a local restaurant. 他們在當地的餐廳舉行了一場快樂的派對來慶祝畢業。
The fans were jubilant after their team won the championship. 球隊奪冠後，球迷們欣喜若狂。
He was jubilant about his promotion. 他對獲得晉升感到非常高興。
There was a sense of jubilation in the air after the victory. 勝利後，空氣中瀰漫著一陣歡欣鼓舞的氣氛。
The announcement was met with shouts of jubilation. 消息宣佈時，現場響起了歡呼聲。

meaning: 慶祝或歡樂的聲音；歡呼聲。
sentences: The term jubilee refers to the sound of celebration or rejoicing; shouts of joy. 「禧年」一詞指的是慶祝或歡樂的聲音；歡呼聲。
The lesson introduced jubilee as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了禧年這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The judge carefully listened to the arguments of both sides. 法官仔細聽取了雙方的論點。
You shouldn't judge a book by its cover; look at the contents. 你不應該以貌取人；要看內在內容。
Please use your best judgment to solve this difficult problem. 請用您最好的判斷力來解決這個難題。
The final judgment of the court will be announced tomorrow. 法院的最終判決將在明天宣佈。
The country's judicial system is based on the principles of fairness and justice. 該國的司法制度是基於公平和正義的原則。
A judicial review was launched to investigate the legality of the new policy. 一項司法審查已啟動，以調查新政策的合法性。

meaning: 法官、大法官等的集體團體。
sentences: The term judiciary refers to the collective body of judges, justices, etc. 司法機構一詞是指由法官、大法官等組成的集體機構。
The lesson introduced judiciary as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了司法作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The manager made a judicious decision based on the available data. 經理根據現有數據做出了一個明智的決定。
He is known for his judicious use of resources. 他以審慎使用資源著稱。

meaning: 改編自柔術的日本武術與運動。
sentences: He started doing judo at the age of eight. 他八歲開始練習柔道。
The term judo refers to a Japanese martial art and sport adapted from jujutsu. 柔道一詞是指從柔術改編而來的日本武術和運動。
She poured some fresh milk from the ceramic jug into her coffee. 她從瓷壺裡倒了一些鮮牛奶到咖啡中。
He ended up in the jug for several nights after the minor incident. 在那起輕微事件後，他在牢裡待了幾個晚上。

meaning: 一次處理或管理多項任務。
sentences: He juggled home, school, and work for two years. 兩年來，他兼顧家庭、學校和工作。
To juggle means to handle or manage many tasks at once. 兼顧意味著同時處理或管理許多任務。

meaning: 任何 嚴重 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="///tle="
sentences: It was vicious; he went for the jugular. 這是惡毒的 ； 他瞄準了 頸靜脈 。 這是惡毒的；他直擊要害。 這是惡毒的；他用槍瞄準了頸靜脈。
The term jugular refers to Any critical vulnerability. 頸靜脈一詞是指 任何 嚴重 嚴重 "vult; 術語“頸靜脈”是指任何嚴重的脆弱性。 頸部靜脈血栓是指任何嚴重的嚴重「vult;
I usually have a glass of fresh orange juice with my breakfast. 我早餐通常喝一杯新鮮的柳橙汁。
Would you like some apple juice or grape juice? 你想要點蘋果汁還是葡萄汁？
The fresh peaches were sweet and juicy, and everyone loved them. 這些新鮮桃子又甜又多汁，每個人都喜歡。
The steak was cooked to perfection, tender and juicy inside. 這塊牛排煮得恰到好處，內部鮮嫩多汁。

meaning: 行動或行為的（通常是負面的）業力後果。
sentences: That's some bad juju. 那是一些糟糕的juju。
The term juju refers to The (usually negative) karmic consequences of an action or behavior. juju 一詞指的是行動或行為的（通常是負面的）業力後果。
Jujube is a common ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. 紅棗是中藥中常見的食材。
She made a healthy herbal soup with jujubes and goji berries. 她做了一道加了紅棗和枸杞的健康草藥湯。

meaning: 打斷與不相關話題的談話。
sentences: Smith likes juking religion when talking with his family at dinner. 史密斯喜歡在晚餐時與家人交談時開玩笑宗教。
People often juke when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會開玩笑。

meaning: 能夠重播數位音樂收藏中的曲目的軟體應用程式。
sentences: The term jukebox refers to a software application capable of replaying tracks from a digital music collection. 點唱機一詞是指能夠重播數位音樂收藏中的曲目的軟體應用程式。
The lesson introduced jukebox as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了點唱機作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 義大利前硬幣，由教宗尤利烏斯二世 (1503-13) 鑄造。
sentences: The term julio refers to a former coin of Italy, struck by Pope Julius II (1503-13). julio 一詞指的是義大利前硬幣，由教宗朱利葉斯二世（1503-13 年）鑄造。
The lesson introduced julio as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 julio 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 以混亂的方式相遇或結合。
sentences: I tried to study, but in my half-awake state, all of the concepts seemed to jumble together. 我試著學習，但在半醒的狀態下，所有的概念似乎都混在一起了。
People often jumble when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會陷入混亂。
a jumbo helping 一個巨大的幫助
Something described as jumbo is especially large or powerful. 被描述為“巨型”的東西特別大或強大。
The little girl jumped for joy when she heard the good news. 小女孩聽到好消息時高興得跳了起來。
He had to jump over the puddle to avoid getting his shoes wet. 他不得不跳過水坑，以免弄濕鞋子。

meaning: 火車（通常是客運列車）車輛之間的電氣連接；跨接電纜。
sentences: The term jumper refers to an electrical connection between the vehicles of a train, usually a passenger train; a jumper cable. 跨接器一詞是指火車（通常是客運列車）車輛之間的電氣連接；跨接電纜。
The lesson introduced jumper as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了跳線作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Please be careful when you reach the busy junction in the city center. 當你到達繁忙的市中心交叉路口時請小心。
The small village is located at the junction of two major rivers. 那座小村莊坐落在兩條大河的匯合點。
We're at a crucial juncture in our relationship. 我們正處於關係的關鍵時刻。
The term juncture refers to a critical moment in time. 「關頭」一詞指的是關鍵時刻。
The school year ends in June. 學年於六月結束。
The weather is usually warm and sunny in June. 六月的天氣通常溫暖且陽光明媚。
The explorers spent several weeks trekking through the dense jungle. 探險家們花了數週時間在茂密的叢林中跋涉。
The story is about a young boy who was raised by animals in the jungle. 這個故事是關於一個在叢林中由動物養大的小男孩。
He is currently a junior student studying engineering at university. 他目前是大學工程專業的三年級學生。
She works as a junior analyst in the international marketing department. 她在國際行銷部門擔任初級分析師。

meaning: 許多類似杜鬆的針葉樹之一。
sentences: The term juniper refers to one of a number of coniferous trees which resemble junipers. 杜鬆一詞是指許多類似杜鬆的針葉樹之一。
The lesson introduced juniper as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了杜松子作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
We need to clear out all the old junk from the attic and garage. 我們需要清理閣樓和車庫裡所有的舊垃圾。
You should avoid eating too much junk food for your physical health. 為了身體健康，妳應該避免吃太多的垃圾食物。

meaning: 理事會、大會、法庭或集會；特別是西班牙國家大委員會。
sentences: The term junta refers to a council, convention, tribunal or assembly; especially, the grand council of state in Spain. 軍政府一詞是指理事會、大會、法庭或議會；特別是西班牙國家大委員會。
The lesson introduced junta as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「軍政府」這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 解釋和適用法律的權力、權利或授權。
sentences: legal jurisdiction 法律管轄權
The case falls outside the court’s jurisdiction. 該案不屬於法院的管轄範圍。
The jury reached a unanimous verdict of not guilty after several hours. 經過數小時後，陪審團一致裁定無罪。
A jury of experts was selected to judge the international art competition. 一個專家評判委員會被選出來評判這場國際藝術比賽。
I have just finished my homework and now I'm going to play. 我剛做完功課，現在要去玩了。
It's just a small mistake; don't worry too much about it. 這只是一個小錯誤，別太擔心。
They fought for many years to achieve social justice and equality. 他們奮鬥了多年以實現社會正義與平等。
The supreme court is responsible for upholding justice in the country. 最高法院負責維護國家的正義。

meaning: 描述一種非法且故意的行為，但不應受到譴責，例如，因為其積極後果超過了不良後果。與情有可原的區別，描述非自願的違法行為。
sentences: justifiable homicide 合理殺人

Something described as justifiable is describing an illegal and intentional act that is nevertheless not blameworthy, for example because its positive consequences outweighed the bad. Distinguished from excusable, describing an involuntary illegal act. 被描述為正當的事物是指描述一種非法且故意的行為，但該行為並不應受譴責，例如，因為其積極後果超過了不良後果。與情有可原的區別，描述非自願的非法行為。
It is difficult to justify such a large expenditure on luxury office furniture. 很難證明在豪華辦公家具上花費這麼大一筆支出是有理的。
He tried to justify his actions by saying that he was only following orders. 他試圖辯解（證明有理），說他只是在服從命令。

meaning: 以公正或公平的方式；理所當然。
sentences: The team responded justly to the change. 該團隊對這一變化做出了公正的反應。
She handled the problem justly during the meeting. 她在會議期間公正地處理了這個問題。
The program aims to address the problem of juvenile delinquency in the city. 該計畫旨在解決城市中的青少年犯罪問題。
I found his constant practical jokes to be rather juvenile and annoying. 我發現他不斷的惡作劇相當幼稚且討厭。

meaning: 一起列出的一組單字中缺少連結元素。
sentences: Example: mother father instead of mother and father. The word juxtaposition is central here. 例：媽媽爸爸而不是媽媽和爸爸。並置這個詞在這裡是核心。
The term juxtaposition refers to An absence of linking elements in a group of words that are listed together. 並置一詞是指列出在一起的一組單字中缺少連結元素。
